## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What use case are you trying to address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## SAP CC Area

Which area of SAP Commerce Cloud does this relate to?

- [ ] FlexibleSearch / data querying
- [ ] Groovy scripting
- [ ] ImpEx
- [ ] Cronjobs / Business Processes
- [ ] Cloud Portal API (builds, deployments, environments…)
- [ ] Monitoring / Logs
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
